_doc: Filter rules for visualization/qc.py — the single source of truth for thresholds, category metadata, colors, and page layout. qc.py loads this at startup; edit values here instead of editing the script. Pass --filters <path> to override per-run.

thresholds._doc: Numeric cutoffs used by classify() and the extent computation.

categories._doc: Ordered classification chain. classify() evaluates categories by priority (lowest first); first match wins. Each entry: color (hex), problem (bool — counts against session in summary + sort), priority (int — lower sorts to top of page), rule + description (documentation only).

no_traj.description: Trajectory file missing or too short to compute motion

all_nan_gripper.rule: gripper_distances.txt present but every value is NaN
all_nan_gripper.description: AprilTag never detected — no finite signal

static.description: Trajectory exists but camera barely moved (<1 cm)

flat_gripper.rule: motion present AND finite gripper_std < thresholds.flat_gripper_std
flat_gripper.description: Camera moved but gripper signal has no actuation

display._doc: Plot appearance and page layout. Hex colors only.
display._doc_rich: Rich (default) per-episode page = [RGB+projection][3D trajectory][gripper]. Slower (3D over ~1000 eps); pass --simple for the 2D layout above.
